use rayon::prelude::*;

// GOOD: use map/filter/reduce instead of Mutex collection
fn find_errors(files: &[PathBuf]) -> Vec<Error> {
    files.par_iter()
        .flat_map(|file| {
            let content = std::fs::read_to_string(file).unwrap();
            content.lines()
                .filter_map(|line| check_line(line))
                .collect::<Vec<_>>()
        })
        .collect()
}

fn collect_metrics(data: &[DataPoint]) -> Vec<Metric> {
    data.par_iter()
        .map(|point| compute_metric(point))
        .collect()
}
